title: Bee Removal in Hewlett, NY | $350 - $550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Hewlett, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction starting at $350. Licensed experts serving Hewlett Harbor and surrounding areas. Call today!
intro: When bees establish hives in your Hewlett property, you need safe and effective removal from experienced professionals. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bee removal services throughout Hewlett and the Five Towns area, protecting your family while preserving these important pollinators whenever possible. Our licensed technicians respond quickly to bee infestations in homes and businesses across this beautiful Long Island community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of specialized experience to Hewlett properties, with deep knowledge of the bee species common to Long Island's South Shore. Our technicians use proven, eco-conscious methods that prioritize safety for your family, pets, and the environment while delivering lasting results at transparent, competitive prices.
localContext: Hewlett's tree-lined streets, waterfront properties near Hewlett Harbor, and mix of classic colonials and modern homes create ideal nesting opportunities for honeybees, carpenter bees, and bumblebees. The proximity to Hewlett Bay Park and the area's mature landscaping means residential properties often encounter bee activity during spring and summer months, requiring prompt professional attention.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Hewlett typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, colony size, and accessibility. Difficult-to-reach nests in walls, attics, or high eaves may require additional work. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any removal work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Hewlett property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Hewlett bee removal requests. Once on-site, most bee removals can be completed within 2-4 hours depending on the hive's size and location. Emergency services are available for situations posing immediate danger to residents or visitors.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, especially for honeybees which are vital pollinators. Our technicians work with local beekeepers to rehome colonies when feasible. However, in cases involving aggressive species, structural damage, or health risks, safe extermination may be necessary to protect your property and family.

faqs.question: What types of bees are common in Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Hewlett properties most commonly experience issues with honeybees (often in walls or attics), carpenter bees (damaging wood structures and trim), and bumblebees (nesting in ground cavities or under decks). Our team accurately identifies each species and applies the appropriate removal method to ensure complete elimination and prevent future infestations.
